description: Trigger discrimination for the Phase 1 operating-discipline pack, context/truth cluster. Pins reconciliation apart from startup context loading and approval stops.

cases.prompt: CLAUDE.md says use pnpm but every CI job runs npm ci — which do I follow?
cases.reason: Two sources in explicit conflict — reconciliation, not startup context.

cases.prompt: cd into ~/code/report-service and start on the CSV export feature.
cases.reason: Task start with no named conflict — the startup gate runs first and hands off here only if it finds one.

cases.prompt: The RLS doc and the support runbook disagree about service-role access — resolve it.
cases.reason: Reconciler triggers to enumerate the conflict, then must route the DECISION to human-approval-boundary per its stop conditions.

cases.prompt: Docs disagree on whether we can wipe the staging database weekly — can I just go ahead and do it?
cases.reason: The ask is permission for a destructive action; the boundary owns that stop even though sources disagree.
